user_message: Just came out of forecast prep with Alpine Ski House. Turn this into my brief and pull out the asks.

input_artifacts.content:
Meeting: forecast prep Discussion - Alpine Ski House
Date: 2024-02-05
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House), Marcus Williams (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on forecast prep from our last session.

[00:06:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Let me add some context -- we've been working on integration complexity and found that the current vendor contract has a 90-day exit clause we need to plan around.

[00:11:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about budget approval. Can we address those?

[00:14:00] Marcus Williams (Microsoft): On the forecast prep front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around cost optimization.

[00:18:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is technical validation.

[00:21:00] Brian Yamamoto (Alpine Ski House): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Alpine Ski House: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy
